baseline_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 1 and mode RAIL
baseline_results.sql: SELECT s.S_NATIONKEY, l.L_SHIPMODE, COUNT(*) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_EXTENDEDPRICE) AS gross_value, SUM(CASE WHEN l.L_RECEIPTDATE <= l.L_COMMITDATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_lines FROM SUPPLIER s JOIN LINEITEM l ON s.S_SUPPKEY = l.L_SUPPKEY WHERE s.S_NATIONKEY = 1 AND l.L_SHIPMODE = 'RAIL' GROUP BY s.S_NATIONKEY, l.L_SHIPMODE

baseline_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=7, suppliers>=3
baseline_results.sql: WITH part_activity AS ( SELECT l.L_PARTKEY AS partkey, COUNT(*) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_QUANTITY) AS total_qty FROM LINEITEM l GROUP BY l.L_PARTKEY), supplier_diversity AS ( SELECT ps.PS_PARTKEY AS partkey, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count FROM PARTSUPP ps GROUP BY ps.PS_PARTKEY) SELECT p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE, pa.line_count, pa.total_qty, sd.supplier_count FROM PART p JOIN part_activity pa ON p.P_PARTKEY = pa.partkey JOIN supplier_diversity sd ON p.P_PARTKEY = sd.partkey WHERE p.P_SIZE >= 7 AND sd.supplier_count >= 3 ORDER BY pa.total_qty DESC FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

baseline_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 3 in 1995
baseline_results.sql: SELECT c.C_NATIONKEY, COUNT(DISTINCT o.O_ORDERKEY) AS order_count, SUM(l.L_EXTENDEDPRICE * (1 - l.L_DISCOUNT)) AS net_revenue FROM CUSTOMER c JOIN ORDERS o ON c.C_CUSTKEY = o.O_CUSTKEY JOIN LINEITEM l ON o.O_ORDERKEY = l.L_ORDERKEY WHERE c.C_NATIONKEY = 3 AND o.O_ORDERDATE >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o.O_ORDERDATE < DATE '1996-01-01' GROUP BY c.C_NATIONKEY

mcp_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 1 and mode RAIL
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT S_SUPPKEY, S_NAME, COUNT(L_ORDERKEY) AS DELIVERY_COUNT, SUM(L_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_QUANTITY
FROM SUPPLIER
JOIN LINEITEM ON S_SUPPKEY = L_SUPPKEY
JOIN PART ON L_PARTKEY = P_PARTKEY
JOIN NATION ON S_NATIONKEY = N_NATIONKEY
WHERE N_NATIONKEY = 1 AND L_SHIPMODE = 'RAIL'
GROUP BY S_SUPPKEY, S_NAME
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=7, suppliers>=3
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT P.P_PARTKEY, P.P_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT S.S_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS total_demand
FROM PART P
JOIN PARTSUPP PS ON P.P_PARTKEY = PS.PS_PARTKEY
JOIN SUPPLIER S ON PS.PS_SUPPKEY = S.S_SUPPKEY
JOIN LINEITEM L ON P.P_PARTKEY = L.L_PARTKEY
GROUP BY P.P_PARTKEY, P.P_NAME
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT S.S_SUPPKEY) >= 3 AND SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) >= 7
FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 3 in 1995
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT 
    N.N_NAME AS Nation,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM O.O_ORDERDATE) AS Order_Year,
    EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM O.O_ORDERDATE) AS Order_Quarter,
    SUM(L.L_EXTENDEDPRICE * (1 - L.L_DISCOUNT)) AS Revenue,
    COUNT(O.O_ORDERKEY) AS Total_Orders
FROM 
    NATION N
JOIN 
    CUSTOMER C ON N.N_NATIONKEY = C.C_NATIONKEY
JOIN 
    ORDERS O ON C.C_CUSTKEY = O.O_CUSTKEY
JOIN 
    LINEITEM L ON O.O_ORDERKEY = L.L_ORDERKEY
WHERE 
    N.N_NATIONKEY = 3 
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM O.O_ORDERDATE) = 1995
GROUP BY 
    N.N_NAME, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM O.O_ORDERDATE), EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM O.O_ORDERDATE)
ORDER BY 
    Order_Quarter
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 4 and mode MAIL
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT S_SUPPKEY, S_NAME, COUNT(L_ORDERKEY) AS DELIVERY_COUNT, SUM(L_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_QUANTITY
FROM SUPPLIER
JOIN PARTSUPP ON S_SUPPKEY = PS_SUPPKEY
JOIN LINEITEM ON PS_PARTKEY = L_PARTKEY
JOIN ORDERS ON L_ORDERKEY = O_ORDERKEY
JOIN NATION ON S_NATIONKEY = N_NATIONKEY
WHERE N_NATIONKEY = 4 AND L_SHIPMODE = 'MAIL'
GROUP BY S_SUPPKEY, S_NAME
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=10, suppliers>=1
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT P.P_PARTKEY, P.P_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT S.S_SUPPKEY) AS SUPPLIER_COUNT, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_DEMAND
FROM PART P
JOIN PARTSUPP PS ON P.P_PARTKEY = PS.PS_PARTKEY
JOIN SUPPLIER S ON PS.PS_SUPPKEY = S.S_SUPPKEY
JOIN LINEITEM L ON P.P_PARTKEY = L.L_PARTKEY
GROUP BY P.P_PARTKEY, P.P_NAME
HAVING SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) >= 10 AND COUNT(DISTINCT S.S_SUPPKEY) >= 1
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 6 in 1998
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(L.L_EXTENDEDPRICE * (1 - L.L_DISCOUNT)) AS REVENUE,
    COUNT(O.O_ORDERKEY) AS ORDER_COUNT,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM O.O_ORDERDATE) AS ORDER_YEAR,
    EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM O.O_ORDERDATE) AS ORDER_QUARTER
FROM 
    ORDERS O
JOIN 
    CUSTOMER C ON O.O_CUSTKEY = C.C_CUSTKEY
JOIN 
    NATION N ON C.C_NATIONKEY = N.N_NATIONKEY
JOIN 
    LINEITEM L ON O.O_ORDERKEY = L.L_ORDERKEY
WHERE 
    N.N_NATIONKEY = 6 
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM O.O_ORDERDATE) = 1998
GROUP BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM O.O_ORDERDATE), 
    EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM O.O_ORDERDATE)
FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
